mapper.select: SELECT ID, COMMENT_CONTENT, COMMENT_CREATE_AT, COMMENT_LIKE_COUNT, COMMENT_REPLY_COUNT, COMMENT_ID, USER_NICKNAME, USER_PROFILE, USER_ID, POST_ID FROM VW_COMMENT WHERE POST_ID = #{postId} ORDER BY COALESCE(COMMENT_ID, ID) DESC, COMMENT_ID NULLS FIRST, ID DESC

SELECT ID, COMMENT_CONTENT, COMMENT_CREATE_AT, COMMENT_LIKE_COUNT, COMMENT_REPLY_COUNT, USER_NICKNAME, USER_PROFILE, POST_ID, USER_ID FROM VW_COMMENT WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
AND (COMMENT_CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR USER_NICKNAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
ORDER BY COMMENT_LIKE_COUNT DESC
ORDER BY ID DESC
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_COMMENT.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_COMMENT (ID, COMMENT_CONTENT, POST_ID, USER_ID, COMMENT_ID) VALUES (#{id}, #{commentContent}, #{postId}, #{userId}, #{commentId})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_COMMENT WHERE ID = #{id} AND POST_ID = #{postId} AND COMMENT_IS_DELETED = 0 AND COMMENT_ID IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_COMMENT WHERE ID = #{id} AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND COMMENT_IS_DELETED = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_COMMENT WHERE ID = #{commentId} AND COMMENT_ID IS NULL AND COMMENT_IS_DELETED = 0
